creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #1)

Hi,

last overwrite I experienced was today:

Feb 26 10:34:57 mybox pkg[8195]: lightdm upgraded: 1.32.0_1 -> 1.32.0_3

Consequent reinstall did not overwrite

Feb 26 18:23:56 mybox pkg[2953]: lightdm reinstalled: 1.32.0_3 -> 1.32.0_3

Thank you for the explanation, package now works as intended (not overwriting config files, I agree this is FIXED, closing.
